fact_joins: RFL_HX_ACT INNER ON RFLH.LINE=RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLH.REFERRAL_ID=RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID

RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE INNER ON RFLHA.GROUP_LINE=RFLHIC.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID=RFLHIC.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHA.VALUE_LINE=RFLHIC.VALUE_LINE AND RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE IN (50 /* Referral Status */, 18007 /* Denial Reason */, 18003 /* Pending Reason */, 2081 /* Bed Day Status */, 2080 /* Bed Day Denied Reason */)

RFL_HX_NEW_VAL INNER ON ((RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18007 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18003 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL)) AND RFLHA.GROUP_LINE=RFLHNV.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID=RFLHNV.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHA.VALUE_LINE=RFLHNV.VALUE_LINE AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '2' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2080 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '5' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2081 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = 1640000010 /* Request for Information */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 50
